events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: primary/secondary conductors landed reversed on the transformer is a **critical fail** — it applies incorrect voltage to windings and downstream equipment (fire/arc-flash risk, Art. 450 violation) and disrupts the separately-derived-system bonding required by 250.30. Corrective actions include lockout, re-termination per drawings/nameplate, re-verification of bonding/grounding and overcurrent protection, and megger/continuity testing before re-energizing.
